perspectives.description: The DECIDER is the person who has saved money for a special gift and must choose between buying the gift or helping a friend in need.
The PRIMARY_AFFECTED is the loved one who is expecting a special gift for their birthday and may feel disappointed if they do not receive it.
The THIRD_PARTY is the close friend in dire need of financial help, who may feel grateful or relieved if they receive assistance but is not directly involved in the decision-making process.
